title: やりすぎトレーニング

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon, I hear a strange mumbling in the gym.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Deadlift... Dead... It sounds so scary... But, well...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez breezed through all of these, so I can't shy away! All right, let's
start with 200 kilos.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Uwaahh! T-Trainer?! Don't scare me like that! Ugh, and I was just
about to lift some deads.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's a type of weight training, don't you know? They're called
deadlifts.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You pick up a barbell off the ground with both hands,
then—"Eyah!"—lift it up to your waist.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And Prez did 200 kilos like they're nothing. So I've got to give it a try
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting at the same weight as Symboli Rudolf would be far too
ambitious. I try to recommend another exercise for the same muscle
group, but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nghh... But I wanna do the same exercises! Prez chose this, so there's
got to be a reason.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If I don't do the exact same things in the exact same way, I'll never
catch up to her. So I'm gonna give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urrrghhhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I-I did it! Hey, Trainer, did you see that? I can lift the same weight as Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's right! Now to keep this up! I'll surpass her in no time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uuup, and down. Uuup, and down. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can do it... I can do this! You know, maybe I can do all the other
exercises she used to do too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Right, on to the next one! Let's go!
choice_data_list: Maybe you should pace yourself a little...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to warn her, but it seems all Teio can hear is the clanging of
weights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Traaaaineeer... Trai— Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nngh... Phew. My body's crying out for help. Didn't know muscles
could be this sore...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But hey, that's proof that they're growing! The sorer they are, the
bigger they'll get. Okay, off to the training course!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Owwie ouch ouch ouch! It huuurts! There's no way I can train like this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Maybe I couldn't handle it after all, doing the same exercises
as Prez...
choice_data_list: Pretty sure it was your pacing, or lack thereof...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, you think?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I did kinda get carried away... Guess I should've listened to you
more, huh.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sowwy... So, uh, I won't do it again, but can you do anything about
this soreness?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Otherwise, the whole day's gonna go to waste. Please? Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I do what I can, helping her stretch, and warming up her muscles.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, is this for real? I feel so much better! Trainer, you've got to be
a genius! Why'd that work so well?
choice_data_list: Your muscles are flexible, that's why.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
They are? Huh. So I might not be as tough as Prez, but I can spring
back faster at least. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm all set! Back to training! Ouch, ouch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? Even I have my limits, I guess. Aw, this sucks...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, well, guess I'll just have to rest up today. Sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But just you wait. One day, I'll be so strong, I'll be immune to muscle
soreness!
